name: HF Company SA
summary: HF Company SA engages in the design and distribution of products and services for the home digital life market in Asia, Europe, and the United States. It provides access solutions, such as xDSL or fiber solutions for the telecommunications markets; networking products; and smartgrid and digital broadband related products and services. The company offers its products under the METRONIC, mooov, and LEA Networks brand names. HF Company SA was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Tauxigny, France.
